domain: information theory / cognitive psychology (exponential memory-recency decay)
specific_mechanism: effective-attention decay as exp(-d/tau) with tau ~= 0.7 * nominal context length
llm_application: effective context utilization in transformers decays exponentially with token distance and tau scales as constant fraction of nominal length
novelty_claim: specific exponential form with universal tau/L ratio of 0.7; testable across architectures
